instruction: Install LanguageTool extension for my LibreOffice

evaluator.eval: check_list(get_cache_file(env, config={'path': 'grep.out'}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expect': ['org\\.openoffice\\.languagetool\\.oxt']}})) and check_list(get_cache_file(env, config={'path': 'apt.out'}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expect': ['openjdk-\\d+-(jre|jdk)']}}))
